context: Aroga Lifestyle Medicine. Victoria, British Columbia. Multi-specialty collaborative lifestyle medicine organization with 35+ physicians and clinicians across 7 cities in Canada. 11-50 employees. Decision maker: Lorne Friesen (CEO) lorne@aroga.com and Jasdeep Saluja (saluja@aroga.com). Cash-pay programs: Women's Health Program (6-month program) starting at $1,999. Also offers Reversal & Prevention and On-Going Monthly Care programs. 10,000+ patients served. Estimated MRR $30,000+. Social: LinkedIn ~1.6k, Instagram @aroga_medicine ~8.6k, Facebook ~500.

MaxWell Clinic. Brentwood, Tennessee (Nashville suburb). Large multi-practitioner functional/integrative medicine facility with 30+ employees, 9 practitioners. Decision maker: David Haase MD (CEO & Founder) - contact: michelle@maxwellclinic.com, kevin@maxwellclinic.com, jason@maxwellclinic.com. Cash-pay programs: MaxWell Care Program - 3-month plan $3,100 + $900 onboarding fee; 12-month plan $4,900 + $900 onboarding fee. Includes clinician visits, unlimited MaxWell Advocate visits, nutritionist support, diagnostics, personalized plan, unlimited messaging, supplement discounts. Also offers Deep Dive Program, Plasma Exchange, Ketamine Infusions, IV Therapies. Estimated MRR $48,333-$58,333+. High social media activity.

Integrative Wellness Center of Jacksonville. Jacksonville Beach, Florida. 4 practitioners: Dr. Melissa Levy Ellis (Founder/DACM/AP), Dr. Suffield, Dr. Gausik, Roshinie Ramdin. 6 total staff. Decision maker: Dr. Melissa Levy Ellis - dr.levy@iwcjacksonville.com. Cash-pay programs: Functional Gut Health Program $1,650 (includes GI-MAP, IgG Food Sensitivity Testing, 1 Initial Consultation, 1 Test Review, 4 Follow-Up Coaching Calls, Personalized Health Improvement Plan). Also Functional Hormone Program, Functional Fertility Program (pricing not listed), Acupuncture, Cupping, Gua Sha, Massage Therapy. Estimated MRR $30,000+. Instagram @integrativewellnes_jax ~1.8k followers.

West Holistic Medicine. Austin, Texas. 5 practitioners: Dr. Ashley Maltz MD MPH (Owner), Dr. Afridi (MD), Danielle Bower (Acupuncturist), Darby Carter (Health Coach), FNP/Ayurvedic Counselor. 5-10 total employees. Decision maker: Dr. Ashley Maltz - amaltz@westholisticmedicine.com. Cash-pay programs: Physician Membership $165/month (30 min/mo via text/portal/phone/in-person, includes refills, FMLA paperwork, labs, monthly educational gatherings). Acupuncture Membership $250/month (2 sessions) or $450/month (4 sessions). Health Coaching Membership $200/month (bi-weekly) or $360/month (weekly). Pay-As-You-Go: Dr. Maltz initial $550 (75 min), follow-up $250 (30 min). Estimated MRR $30,000-$50,000+. LinkedIn, Instagram @westholisticmedicine, Facebook active.

Functional Medicine Florida / The Harvey Center for Integrative Medicine. Sarasota, Florida. 2 practitioners: Dr. Fred Harvey (4x Board Certified Medical Director/Founder/Owner) and Sara Winer (Health Coach). 4 total staff including Cody (Phlebotomist) and Juan (Office Manager). Decision maker: Dr. Fred Harvey - doc@functionalmedicineflorida.com. Cash-pay only practice (stepped away from insurance). Discovery Visit $200 (refundable with 24-hour notice). Initial appointments 1-2 hours. High-value services including chelation therapy (~$2000), Xymogen and Designs For Health supplements. Estimated MRR $30,000-$50,000+. Active on Facebook (833 likes), Instagram @functionalmedicineflorida (351 followers), YouTube, LinkedIn.

SHIFT Functional Medicine. Bend, Oregon. 7 practitioners, 10-15+ total employees. Decision maker: Dr. Marie Agnew (Founder and CEO) - marie@shiftfunctionalmed.com. Cash-pay membership model (not covered by insurance). Includes extended visit times, supplement discounts, exclusive events. Membership pricing not publicly listed. Well-established group practice. Estimated MRR $35,000-$70,000+. Active on LinkedIn, Instagram @shift.functional.med, Facebook.
